conditions.leftValue: ={{ (function() { var pickup = $json.body.pickup_time || 'ASAP'; var now = new Date(); var day = now.getDay(); var hour = now.getHours(); var min = now.getMinutes(); var isWeekday = day >= 1 && day <= 6; if (!isWeekday) return false; var openMin = 12 * 60 + 30; var closeMin = 19 * 60 + 30; if (pickup === 'ASAP') { var currentMin = hour * 60 + min; var asapMin = currentMin + 30; return asapMin >= openMin && asapMin <= closeMin; } else { var parts = pickup.split(':'); var pHour = parseInt(parts[0]); var pMin = parseInt(parts[1]); var pickupMin = pHour * 60 + pMin; return pickupMin >= openMin && pickupMin <= closeMin; } })() }}
